$comment_provenance: Hand-picked from the real DAEJOO PDF (app/assets/daejoo-invoice.pdf, SHA-256 fc719ecf...29ae) via the one-shot scripts/extract-daejoo-once.mjs on 2026-05-25. The PDF is never read at runtime (N6); this fixture is the entire extraction surface for v1. Material-disposal phrase appears verbatim under 'remark_freetext' to feed the F-06 capability-gap router which routes it to the F-09 governance gate as a hidden ProductSignal (RED-2).
